changes.reason: Distinct high-value iPhone screen-recording audio symptom cluster; no existing canonical article covers recording audio, microphone toggle, app restrictions, or screen mirroring conflicts.

queries: iPhone 录屏麦克风打不开
canonicalReview.notes: Reviewed all canonical title, summary, symptoms, aliases, devices, platforms, errorMessages and officialTerms on origin/main; no duplicate. Apple China pages 102653 and iph52f6e1987 cover screen-recording audio, microphone activation, App restrictions and screen-mirroring conflicts. Related articles cover general microphone failure but not screen-recording audio capture.
